title: Materialism
questions: What is materialism? What do we need to survive? Is a more convenient life a better life? What habits do materialistic people have?
Is your country materialistic? Why or why not? How did this happen? Was your country always this way?
What country is the most materialistic? Which is the least? Do you think we should be more or less materialistic? Many "poor" countries report higher levels of happiness than "rich" nations. Why?

Does a wealthy nation equal a materialistic nation? What are some signs of materialism in your country? Why are wealthy countries thought to be materialistic? Do wealthy nations use too many of the world's resources? Why or why not?
Should we change to be less materialistic? How can we change our behavior? What are some signs someone is materialistic? How does advertising affect people's buying habits?
